# Peter Farrar Portraits
> Professional portrait photographer based in Basingstoke, Hampshire, UK.

## About
Peter Farrar is a professional portrait photographer offering studio and location portrait sessions for individuals, families, professionals and businesses in Basingstoke, Hampshire and the surrounding area.

## Services
- Individual portrait sessions
- Family portraits
- Professional headshots and business portraits
- Location and studio sessions

## Location
Basingstoke, Hampshire, UK
